zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Reade於大約1455年出生時，他的父親William Reade32歲，母親Joan Pitway29歲。他和Dorothy de Beaumont至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1521年4月27日在英國英格蘭波克夏享年67歲，埋葬在英國波克夏阿炳頓聖 倫恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Reade was born about 1455, his father, William Reade, was 32 and his mother, Joan Pitway, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Dorothy de Beaumont. He died on 27 April 1521, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire, England.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Dorothy de Beaumont. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1521, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire,: St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Reade um 1455 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Reade 32 und seine Mutter Joan Pitway 29. Er hatte mit Dorothy de Beaumont mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. April 1521 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Dorothy de Beaumont. Morì il 27 aprile 1521, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Readeが約1455年に生まれた時，父William Readeは32歳，母Joan Pitwayは29歳であった。彼はDorothy de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1521年4月27日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンスト ヘレン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Helen's Church, Abingdon, Berkshire,: 영국 버크실르 압잉던 스트 헬'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Reade(이)가 대략 1455년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Reade(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Pitway(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Dorothy de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 압잉던 스트 헬'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Dorothy de Beaumont. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Reade родился около 1455 г., его отцу по имени William Reade было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Pitway, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Dorothy de Beaumont. Он умер 27 апреля 1521 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ст хелен'с чурч, абингдон, биркшир, Англия.
